Ci) 622(~) ~27-06-1990 213601197 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETfE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY LPARTll-SEC'. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF EX"ttRNALAFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th August, 1997 G.S.R. 491(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by section 24 of the Passport Act, 1967 (15 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Passport Rules, 1980 namely :- l. (I) These rules may be called the Passport (Amendment) Rules, 1997. (2) They shall come into force from the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Passport Rules, 1980, in rule 2, in clause (c), for sub-clause (iii) the following sub-clause shall be substituted, narnely t=- "(iii) issuing a fresh passport booklet when the pages in the booklet held are almost exhausted: or" [No. VI/40 1I24/90} K. c. STNGH, Jt. Secy. (CPV) Note: The principal rules were published vide GSRnumber 691(E) dated 11·12·1980 and subsequently amended by :- 1. GSR(E) 50(E) dated7-2-l981 2. GSR (E) 494(E) dated 16-6-1981 3. GSR (E) 469(E) dated 24-6-1982 4. GSR(E) 325(E) dated 12-4-1983 5. GSR(E) 482(E) dated 13-6·1983 6 GSR(E) 860(E) dated 1·11·1985 7. GSR (E) 345(E) dated 29·3-1985 8. GSR(E) 857(E) dated 13-10-1987 9. GSR (E) 84(E) dated 1J -2-1988 10. GSR (E) 1155(E) dated 21-11-1988 .11.
